sections.Description:
The Moth is a 3-health, 3-move flying Vek that fires an artillery attack much like theScarab, flying over any tiles to land on the target and deal 1 point of damage. This attack pushes the affected target and the Moth itself away by one tile.
Moths cannot spawn on an island with any other flying Vek (Hornet,Mosquito) other than the island's Psion. In addition, they also cannot spawn with either Scarabs orCrabs.
sections.Strategy: The Moth is the most dangerous regular flying Vek, as in tight spaces it is very likely to be knocked back into a building, dealing heavy damage to your grid. Avoid choosing an island with Moths as your first island; being common enemies with high health, most starting weapons are unable to defeat them consistently in the early game, and with flight they can't bedrownedor dropped intochasmseither. Pushing it into tiles where they can be recoiled into other Vek is a great way of using its attack to your advantage, especially withForce Amp.
sections.Trivia: - Moths were previously able to spawn alongside Scarabs and Crabs. This is no longer the case as of version 1.2.76b.

Moth
Details

Move
3

(
Enemy
)
Effect
Launch an artillery attack for 1 damage, pushing shooter and target.
Special
Flying
: Flying units can move over any terrain tile.
The
Moth
is a flying
Vek
from
Into The Breach
introduced in the Advanced Edition. They are only present if Advanced Enemies are turned on at the start of a new timeline.
Description
[
]
The Moth is a 3-health, 3-move flying Vek that fires an artillery attack much like the
Scarab
, flying over any tiles to land on the target and deal 1 point of damage. This attack pushes the affected target and the Moth itself away by one tile.
Moths cannot spawn on an island with any other flying Vek (Hornet,
Mosquito
) other than the island's Psion. In addition, they also cannot spawn with either Scarabs or
Crabs
.
Strategy
[
]
The Moth is the most dangerous regular flying Vek, as in tight spaces it is very likely to be knocked back into a building, dealing heavy damage to your grid. Avoid choosing an island with Moths as your first island; being common enemies with high health, most starting weapons are unable to defeat them consistently in the early game, and with flight they can't be
drowned
or dropped into
chasms
either. Pushing it into tiles where they can be recoiled into other Vek is a great way of using its attack to your advantage, especially with
Force Amp
.
Trivia
[
]
Moths were previously able to spawn alongside Scarabs and Crabs. This is no longer the case as of version 1.2.76b.
